markets.question: Spread: Detroit Tigers (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLB game between the Texas Rangers and Detroit Tigers, scheduled for May 1 at 6:40 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Detroit Tigers" if the Detroit Tigers win the game by 2 or more runs.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Texas Rangers". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Texas Rangers".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

To know when a postponed game will be played, please check the home team's schedule on MLB.com for the listed team and look for the game described as a makeup game.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Texas Rangers face the Detroit Tigers in the second game of their weekend series at Comerica Park, with probable starters Kumar Rocker (3.38 ERA) for Texas and Keston Montero for Detroit. Tigers traders note recent injuries thinning their roster, including Casey Mize's adductor strain and Javier Báez's ankle sprain placing both on the injured list Tuesday, alongside outfield depth issues from Parker Meadows' earlier fracture; they've recalled Jace Jung and Enmanuel DeJesus. Rangers counter without Wyatt Langford (flexor strain), but Josh Jung enters hot (.381 April, 1.103 OPS). Both clubs hover near .500 (Tigers 16-16, Rangers 15-16), with Detroit boasting a 10-2 home mark amid favorable weather and rest advantages post-series opener. Bullpen health and early offense will prove decisive in this AL matchup.

eventMetadata.context_description: With the Cavaliers holding a 3-2 series lead in this Eastern Conference first-round matchup, Game 6 at Scotiabank Arena puts the Raptors on the brink of elimination, severely hampered by leading scorer Brandon Ingram's heel inflammation ruling him out and Immanuel Quickley's ongoing hamstring strain sidelining him for the entire series. Cleveland enters with a clean injury report, bolstered by their gritty 125-120 road win in Game 5 where Donovan Mitchell and James Harden combined for key scoring bursts amid Toronto's rebounding edge. Raptors' home-court advantage and Scottie Barnes' two-way impact offer upset potential, but Cavaliers' health and rest advantage after the tight victory shape trader consensus toward a closeout, though playoff intensity keeps probabilities competitive.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Solary vs ZYB Esport (BO1) - LFL Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Solary and ZYB Esport in the LFL Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 1 at 4:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Solary" if Solary win the match against ZYB Esport.

This market will resolve to "ZYB Esport" if ZYB Esport win the match against Solary.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Solary enters this LFL Spring Split BO1 as the clear frontrunner atop the group stage standings with a dominant 7-1 record and five-match win streak, including prior victories over mid-table ZYB Esport (3-5, 1-4 in last five) in recent invitational play. Their stable roster—featuring standout top laner Kryze, jungler Zicssi, and import duo Jool and Piero—has propelled back-to-back titles in EMEA Masters Winter and LFL Invitational, showcasing superior macro and objective control. ZYB, bolstered by veteran midlaner Nisqy but hampered by top lane turnover (Wao recent addition), struggles with inconsistency amid a tough late-season schedule pushing for playoffs. BO1 volatility and draft edges could enable an upset, but Solary's momentum drives trader consensus toward their implied edge.

markets.question: Will Chad Bianco win the California Governor Election in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to according to the candidate who wins the 2026 California gubernatorial election currently scheduled for November 3, 2026.

If the results of the election are not confirmed by July 31, 2027, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same candidate. If all three sources haven’t called the race in this state for the same candidate, this market will resolve based on official certification.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent debate performances at Pomona College have propelled Xavier Becerra's surge in polls—from 4% to as high as 24% in late April surveys—narrowing his gap with frontrunner Tom Steyer and fueling trader consensus for a Democratic top-two lockout in California's June nonpartisan primary. Steyer's self-funding advantage and consistent mid-teens polling maintain his edge, while Republicans Steve Hilton and Chad Bianco split conservative support around 14-17% each, heightening risks of mutual elimination in the deep-blue state. Eric Swalwell's exit and Betty Yee's suspension have consolidated Democratic votes amid economy-topping voter concerns. Separation could emerge from final pre-primary polls, key endorsements, or turnout in battleground areas like Riverside County, with the November general pitting primary survivors.

eventMetadata.context_description: Orlando Magic hold a 3-2 series lead over the top-seeded Detroit Pistons in this Eastern Conference first-round playoff matchup, with Game 6 set for Orlando's Kia Center. Magic forward Franz Wagner is out for a second straight game with a right calf strain, depleting their scoring after he averaged 16.8 points through four games, while Jonathan Isaac remains day-to-day (knee). Pistons' Tobias Harris is questionable with a left ankle sprain, impacting their frontcourt depth. Detroit's momentum surged from Game 5's 116-109 road win, fueled by Cade Cunningham's franchise playoff-record 45 points matched by Paolo Banchero, exposing Orlando's free-throw woes (16-for-30). Magic's elite defense returns home for a closeout chance, but Pistons' 60-22 regular-season form keeps elimination odds alive ahead of potential Game 7.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Istanbul be 11°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Istanbul Airport in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LTFM

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Official meteorological observations from stations across Istanbul, including those monitored by the Turkish State Meteorological Service (MGM), confirm the city's highest temperature on May 1, 2026, peaked at 11°C amid persistent light rain, sprinkles, and high cloud cover following a cold front that swept through the region. This aligns with pre-event forecasts from MGM and local agencies like AKOM, which predicted a sharp drop from late-April highs near 20°C due to northerly winds and precipitation suppressing daytime heating. Trader consensus at 100% reflects this verified data, with historical early-May averages around 18–20°C providing context for the anomaly. Revisions from additional station reports or measurement discrepancies could theoretically challenge it, though unlikely given multi-source agreement; final resolution awaits any late official updates.

markets.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $82,000 on May 4?
markets.description:

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

eventMetadata.context_description: In a do-or-die Western Conference first-round Game 6 at Toyota Center, the Lakers hold a 3-2 series lead over the Rockets after Houston's gritty 99-93 Game 5 road win staved off elimination. Both teams battle key absences from official injury reports: Lakers star Luka Doncic sidelined by hamstring strain, while Rockets miss Kevin Durant (ankle), Steven Adams (ankle), and Fred VanVleet (knee). Rockets coach Ime Udoka confirmed starters Reed Sheppard, Amen Thompson, Tari Eason, Jabari Smith Jr., and Alperen Sengun, whose young core has sparked back-to-back triumphs. Lakers lean on LeBron James' playoff prowess amid road pressure, with recent head-to-head split evenly after L.A.'s initial 3-0 edge. Momentum favors Houston's home crowd and rest advantage.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will MrBeast say "Sponsor" or "Sponsored" during his next video?
markets.description:
MrBeast releases videos on https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Mr Beast says the listed term during the next video he releases on YouTube. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips of old videos or prerecorded clips are aired where people are speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will count toward this market's resolution.

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

If no such video is posted by MrBeast by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be the released video from (https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast).

Note: This market refers to MrBeast's next video posted. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Defending World Cup champions Argentina lead trader consensus at 69.5% implied probability as Group J openers against Algeria on June 16 in Kansas City, bolstered by their top-three FIFA ranking, superior squad depth, and strong recent form despite minor injury concerns like Lautaro Martinez's muscular issue in mid-April. Algeria's slim 9% reflects their underdog status—around 40th in rankings—with mounting injury blows in the past week, including goalkeeper Luca Zidane's facial fracture jeopardizing his availability, Amine Gouiri's muscle strain, and absences of Anthony Mandrea (shoulder) and others, weakening their attack and defense. This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Wimbledon (https://www.wimbledon.com/index.html); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices Aryna Sabalenka as the 29% implied probability favorite for the 2026 Women's Wimbledon title, buoyed by her sustained world No.1 ranking and explosive baseline power well-suited to grass-court conditions, though her April withdrawal from Stuttgart due to injury tempers enthusiasm. Elena Rybakina trails closely at 22.5%, leveraging her 2022 Wimbledon triumph, leading 2026 win tally with 26 victories, and recent Stuttgart final run that vaulted her WTA Race No.1. Defending champion Iga Świątek sits third at 16.3% despite her dominant 2025 final bagel over Amanda Anisimova (now 7.5% with career-high No.4 ranking), reflecting her slide to No.4 overall and lingering grass inconsistencies. The bunched odds underscore a wide-open draw ahead of grass prep, with stylistic matchups, surface transitions from clay, and health uncertainties keeping the race fluid.

events.title: Real Betis Balompié vs. Real Oviedo
events.description: This event is for the upcoming La Liga game, scheduled for Sunday, May 3, 2026 between Real Betis Balompié and Real Oviedo.

eventMetadata.context_description: Real Betis Balompié enters as the clear La Liga favorite at 61.5% implied probability against relegation-threatened Real Oviedo, buoyed by strong home form at Benito Villamarín and a top-five table position, while Oviedo languishes in 20th with poor away results and just seven points from safety entering the final stretch. Recent injury returns bolster both sides—Oviedo's Luka Ilic nears availability after Achilles issues and Alex Forés trains, though Leander Dendoncker remains sidelined—yet Betis boasts near-full strength with only Marc Bartra and Ángel Ortiz out, freeing Isco Alarcón and Giovani Lo Celso for selection. A 1-1 head-to-head draw in January underscores Oviedo's upset potential and draw viability at 22.5%, but Betis's momentum positions them as trader consensus leader.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 40-59 tweets from May 1 to May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 1 12:00 PM ET to May 8, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump publicly insult someone on May 12, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump makes any public statement in which he insults, mocks, or attacks any non-fictional individual personally or professionally in a clearly negative manner on the specified date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". 

This includes calling the individual weak, stupid, disloyal, a failure, using an insulting nickname, using other derogatory language, or using the negative form of a positive trait in a derogatory personal way (e.g., “He/She isn’t smart”). Negative forms used in reference to the individual's professional actions, policies, or decisions (e.g., “He/She isn’t being smart about this policy”) will not count. Policy disagreements stated without disparaging language will not count.

A direct reference will qualify even if the individual is not named, so long as it is reasonably clear from context that they are the subject.

Any written, verbal, or recorded public statement by Trump qualifies.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Iran and the United states agree to a permanent peace deal by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. 

A permanent peace deal refers to any agreement which explicitly indicates that military hostilities between the United States and Iran have ended or will permanently cease, or uses equivalent language clearly signaling a lasting end to military hostilities between the United States and Iran. Agreements that are explicitly temporary or which do not include a definitive agreement to end military hostilities between the US and Iran on a lasting basis (e.g. a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026), will not qualify.

A qualifying agreement will be considered to have been established if either of the following conditions are met:

- The United States and Iran each sign or formally adopt a written agreement (e.g. a treaty or multi-point agreement) which meets the above criteria.

- Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established. Negotiations, statements of progress, or other statements which do not constitute a definitive announcement that a qualifying agreement has been reached will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump's rejection of Iran's latest compromise proposal, delivered via Pakistani mediators on May 1, has stalled indirect peace talks, driving trader consensus toward low near-term probabilities for a permanent US-Iran peace deal that explicitly ends military hostilities on a lasting basis. The fragile ceasefire, holding since early April after US airstrikes on Iranian infrastructure and a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, faces sticking points over nuclear suspension demands, sanctions relief, and proxy activities. Potential resumption of negotiations in Islamabad early next week offers a pathway, but skepticism in Washington and the recent scrapping of a US envoy trip underscore significant barriers amid high oil prices and geopolitical tensions.

markets.question: Will "Octane - Don Toliver" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: SPARTA vs fnatic (BO3) - ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #4 Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Lower bracket final match between SPARTA and fnatic in the ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #4 Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 2 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "SPARTA" if SPARTA win the match against fnatic.

This market will resolve to "fnatic" if fnatic win the match against SPARTA.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: SPARTA and fnatic meet in the consolidation final of ESL Challenger League Season 51 Europe Cup #4 playoffs in a pivotal BO3, with both squads showcasing strong double-elimination runs over the past week. SPARTA rides a three-match win streak, including 2-1 triumphs over Rebels Gaming and Lavked plus a 2-0 shutout of GenOne, fueled by TRAVIS's 1.17 HLTV rating amid their revamped roster since mid-March. fnatic rebounded from an upper semis loss to Nemesis with dominant 2-0 sweeps of Phantom and Lavked, leveraging jackasmo's 1.19 rating and veteran KRIMZ's experience. No head-to-head clashes this year, but both favor Dust2 (60% win rates past three months); expect a competitive map veto highlighting recent momentum and stylistic matchups in this $25K event.

events.title: SE Palmeiras vs. Santos FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Brazil Série A game, scheduled for May 2 at 5:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Palmeiras sit atop the Serie A table with 25 points from 10 matches, bolstered by a five-match winning streak capped by a 2-1 victory over Bahia on April 5, showcasing strong home form at Allianz Parque ahead of their May 2 derby clash with rivals Santos. Santos, languishing in 13th, snapped a winless run with a 2-0 clean sheet against Remo on April 2 but remain inconsistent away, drawing recent tests against Cruzeiro and Corinthians. Key absences loom: Palmeiras without left-back Joaquín Piquerez (ankle surgery, out until late May) and possibly Vitor Roque (ankle), while Santos manages Neymar's post-procedure recovery and load management amid his suspension fallout. Historical edge favors Palmeiras (21-15-10 H2H), though derbies breed upsets in this table-defining fixture.

markets.question: Will annual inflation increase by 4.0% in April?
markets.description:
This is a market about inflation over the 12-month period ending April 2026, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

This market will resolve to the percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending in April 2026 according to the monthly Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly BLS CPI news release, which reports inflation over 12-month periods to only one decimal point (e.g., 2.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders price a tight race for April 2026 US CPI annual inflation around 3.6-3.8%, with 3.7% at 35.5% implied probability leading 3.8% (26.8%) and 3.6% (19.0%), reflecting uncertainty in sticky shelter costs and volatile energy prices following March's surprise jump to 3.3% year-over-year—the highest since May 2024—driven by a 10.9% energy surge led by gasoline. The Cleveland Fed's latest nowcast at 3.56% year-over-year anchors the cluster, while base effects from April 2025's low reading and persistent core pressures (2.6% in March) differentiate outcomes. Resolution hinges on the Bureau of Labor Statistics release May 12, with swing factors including recent oil dynamics and housing metrics.

No recent head-to-head exists; map vetoes will be key in this double-elimination bracket, with the winner eyeing the upper final and loser dropping to lower round 2. Rosters remain stable, highlighting current form and playoff pressure as primary sentiment drivers.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin reach $1,000,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) between November 24, 2025, 14:00 and December 31, 2026, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

events.title: Super Rugby Pacific: Reds vs Chiefs
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Super Rugby Pacific match between Reds and Chiefs, scheduled for May 8 2026.

eventMetadata.context_description: Queensland Reds hold a slim trader consensus edge at home in Suncorp Stadium against table-topping Chiefs, whose recent bye provides rest advantages and full recovery for key All Blacks like Damian McKenzie at fly-half and Wallace Sititi at No.8, fueling their league-leading attack with eight wins from ten starts. Reds counter with momentum from snapping a 15-year Crusaders hoodoo via a 31-26 upset, boasting strong home form amid tight Super Rugby Pacific standings, though playmakers Carter Gordon (knee) and Tom Lynagh remain sidelined, testing depth at ten. Head-to-head history and balanced recent records—Chiefs' 42-14 Waratahs rout offset by Reds' resilience—keep implied probabilities bunched near 47%, underscoring a fiercely contested Round 13 clash with draw viability high.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom leads trader consensus at 26% implied probability for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination due to his executive experience as California governor, national visibility from post-2024 anti-Trump advocacy, and strong fundraising potential appealing to party moderates and establishment donors. Kamala Harris at 11% has surged on a late-April Harvard-Harris poll showing her topping Democrats at 50% versus Newsom's 22%, bolstered by her April 10 signals of interest at the National Action Network convention, though 2024 campaign baggage lingers. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez at 8% draws progressive and youth support per youth polls, while Jon Ossoff reflects rising Senate stars. This wide-open field could consolidate around 2026 midterm performers, early fundraising leaders, or endorsements from Biden-era figures, with battleground governors like Josh Shapiro and Pete Buttigieg as dark horses amid pre-primary volatility.

eventMetadata.context_description: Wolves and Burnley have been mathematically relegated, leaving Tottenham Hotspur (18th, 34 points from 34 games) and West Ham United (17th, 36 points) in the drop zone fight, with Nottingham Forest (16th, 39 points) and Leeds United (15th, 40 points) holding narrow buffers via superior goal difference. Spurs' trader-unfriendly form—no Premier League win in 2026, seventh loss in eight—stems from an injury crisis sidelining key players like James Maddison (ACL), compounded by tough remaining fixtures at Aston Villa and Chelsea. West Ham's late drama, including a 90+2' winner versus Everton, and Forest's back-to-back thumpings (4-1 Burnley, 5-0 Sunderland) fuel survival momentum, while Leeds' 3-1 thrashing of Burnley yesterday widens their gap to nine points, heightening desperation in the final four matchweeks ending May 24.

eventMetadata.context_description: Australian prospect Colby Thicknesse (8-1, 1-1 UFC) carries momentum into his Perth homecoming prelim bout against UFC veteran Vince Morales (16-10, 3-8 UFC), fresh off a unanimous decision win over Josias Musasa in September 2025. Both made weight yesterday—Thicknesse at 135 lbs., Morales at 136—with no reported injuries or scratches amid other card changes. Morales, aiming to halt a three-fight skid including a March 2025 unanimous decision loss to Raul Rosas Jr., favors volume striking, while the 26-year-old Thicknesse leverages jiu-jitsu top control from Alexander Volkanovski's camp for takedown threats. Home crowd energy and stylistic contrasts define this closely contested bantamweight matchup.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the closely contested Los Angeles mayoral nonpartisan primary set for June 2, 2026, trader consensus on Polymarket favors City Councilmember Nithya Raman at 50% implied probability, reflecting a controversial late-March poll showing her leading with 33% support amid dissatisfaction with incumbent Karen Bass's record on homelessness, crime, and infrastructure like copper wire thefts from streetlights. Reality TV personality Spencer Pratt's 26% share stems from recent viral campaign ads—including one filmed outside opponents' homes—boosting his outsider appeal after losing his home in the Palisades Fire and topping recent fundraising alongside Raman. Bass trails at 19% despite leading some polls like UCLA Luskin's early April survey (25% with 40% undecided), hampered by 56% unfavorable views; high undecideds and fundraising momentum keep the top-two race volatile.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an overwhelming 78% implied probability on no Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, driven by the absence of a public S-1 filing or roadshow announcements following the company's confidential SEC submission in January 2026, which targeted a Q1 debut with Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as underwriters. Despite 200 million monthly active users and estimated $600–800 million in annual revenue from its freemium model, Discord faces headwinds from a recalibrating tech IPO market, profitability concerns tied to its gamer-centric user base, and a private valuation stuck near $15 billion since 2021 with no upward revisions. The 16.1% odds on sub-$15 billion market cap reflect base-case pricing if listing occurs, while higher brackets languish below 3% amid broader SaaS multiple compression; watch for S-1 emergence or Q2 economic data influencing risk appetite.

eventMetadata.context_description: Oklahoma City Thunder's commanding 4-0 sweep of the Phoenix Suns in the Western Conference first round, capped by Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's 31-point outings, has solidified trader consensus at 55.5% implied probability for the 2026 NBA Championship, reflecting their top-seed dominance and MVP frontrunner status amid an favorable path through the conference semifinals. San Antonio Spurs' 4-1 upset over the Portland Trail Blazers—their first playoff series win since 2017—has propelled them to 20.2%, driven by Victor Wembanyama's breakout and a matchup against the Minnesota Timberwolves-Denver Nuggets winner. Boston Celtics linger at 9.6% despite experience, while Eastern contenders like New York Knicks (5.8%) and Cleveland Cavaliers (4.0%) face stiffer bracket chaos, including Orlando Magic's 3-2 lead over top-seed Detroit Pistons.

markets.question: Will the NYT front-page headlines say "Bitcoin" this week?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed term is included in a headline on the New York Times front page between April 27 and May 3, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A headline is defined as the bolded or enlarged text directly preceding each article, previewing the article’s content and typically separated from the article’s text by a black line and byline. The primary headline for each story is the headline for that story with the largest text, typically appearing in bold font and above any other headlines or text for that article.

Sub-headlines, defined as additional bolded or enlarged text not separated from the primary headline by any text, will count, whether they appear before the byline or are partially surrounded by the article text but still adjacent to the primary headline. Pull quotes, however, or any bolded text not adjacent to the primary headline, will not count.

Banner headlines, defined as front-page headlines bordered on the sides only by white space, will count.

Image captions, article text, or any other text that does not constitute a headline will not qualify.

Any plural or possessive forms of a listed term, as well as variations in capitalization, will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of context. Other forms of the listed term will not count.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all slang forms, will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

If the listed term appears as part of a compound word, use of that compound word will qualify, provided the listed term remains a distinct component of the compound. This does not include suffixes, prefixes, alternative tenses, or grammatical variations that alter the root word. For example, if the listed term is “joy,” “killjoy” qualifies but “joyful” does not. If the listed term is “sun,” “sunflower” qualifies but “sunny” does not.

If the listed term is part of a hyphenated compound, use of that hyphenated compound will qualify. For example, if the listed term is “NATO,” “pro-NATO” and “anti-NATO” qualify.

If the listed term has non-standard transliterations into English, such transliterations will qualify if they are phonetically equivalent. For example, if the listed term is “Erdogan,” “Erdoğan” qualifies. If the listed term is “Zelensky,” “Zelenskiy” qualifies.

If the listed term is an abbreviation, periodized forms of that abbreviation will qualify. For example, if the listed term is “AI,” “A.I.” qualifies. However, extraneous symbols inserted into a word (e.g. r@d1cal for “radical”) will disqualify it from counting toward a “Yes” resolution.

The resolution source for this market will be the New York Times daily newspaper, including images of the front page posted daily at: https://nytimes.pressreader.com/the-new-york-times/.

eventMetadata.context_description: Escalating U.S.-Iran war developments, including a Pentagon estimate of $25 billion in costs and Iran's counter-proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz if America lifts its port blockade, have fueled front-page coverage through April 30, overshadowing domestic stories like Supreme Court voting rights rulings and Trump administration child care deregulation. Earlier in the week, political violence from a White House correspondents' dinner attack and AI risks in biological weapons grabbed headlines, while ongoing Israel-Hezbollah tensions and Trump-Xi summit snags over Iran linger as key narratives. Traders eye May 2-3 papers for potential escalations, such as Israeli strikes or ceasefire breakthroughs, amid volatile oil markets and Federal Reserve signals from Powell's term extension comments.

markets.question: Will Liverpool qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Conference League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Conference League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 English Premier League season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Conference League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or the EPL; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The race for the Premier League's seventh position, which grants a UEFA Conference League league phase spot barring cup adjustments, remains fiercely contested after 34 matchdays, with Brighton & Hove Albion leading at 50 points, AFC Bournemouth at 49, and Chelsea, Brentford, and Fulham level on 48. Brighton's recent form—four wins in their last six—has propelled them ahead, while Bournemouth's string of draws provides stability amid Chelsea's five losses in six. Manchester City's EFL Cup triumph cascades their Conference playoff spot to the highest non-qualified finisher, and the May 16 FA Cup final pitting Chelsea against City could shift Europa League allocation if Chelsea prevails. Four remaining fixtures, including potential head-to-heads and varying schedule strengths, will dictate the outcome alongside injury updates from official reports.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices "Nothing" at 88.5% for former President Barack Obama avoiding federal charges, arrest, or divorce through December 31, 2026, reflecting the absence of any DOJ investigations, special counsel probes, or official announcements in the past 30 days. Recent benign developments, including Higher Ground Productions' April 19 independence from Netflix and Obama's April 21 video endorsing Virginia's redistricting referendum, underscore his focus on media and Democratic mobilization without legal entanglements. A May 1 civil lawsuit against the Obama Foundation over an employee firing lacks federal criminal relevance. Structural barriers—statutes of limitations on past actions and historical reluctance to prosecute ex-presidents—bolster the high implied probability, though late-year indictments or personal scandals could shift odds.

markets.question: Will gemini-3-pro have the best AI model on May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the model that has the highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the specified date, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

No new model will be added to this market after market creation. Any model not explicitly listed in this market will be encompassed under the "Other" option.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie still remains, alphabetical order of model names as listed in this market group (full string, including suffixes such as “-thinking”) will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if two models remain tied, “claude-opus-4-6” would be ranked ahead of “claude-opus-4-6-thinking”). This market will resolve to the model that comes first according to this order.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

Released in February 2026, this variant excels in coding, long-context reasoning, and agentic tasks, holding a narrow lead over close rivals like Claude Opus 4.7 (Thinking) despite leaderboard volatility seen in late April. OpenAI's GPT-5.5 launch on April 23 boosted agentic capabilities but failed to surpass it, solidifying trader confidence in the status quo with no major releases announced ahead of the May 8 snapshot. A surprise model drop or Elo shift could still upend the race.

markets.question: Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Bayern München".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Barcelona vs. FC Bayern München - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane's dominant 99.5% implied probability as Bundesliga top goalscorer stems from his league-leading 33 goals through 31 matchdays, a 15-goal cushion over nearest rival Deniz Undav's 18 for VfB Stuttgart, with Bayern Munich already clinching the title after Kane's strike in their 4-2 win over Stuttgart on Matchday 30 and another versus Mainz on Matchday 31. Traders' consensus reflects Kane's sustained scoring form—netting in six of his last eight outings—bolstered by Bayern's attacking dominance and favorable remaining fixtures against lower-table sides. Realistic challenges would require Kane suffering a season-ending injury sidelining him for the final three matchdays, paired with an unprecedented hot streak from challengers like Undav or Serhou Guirassy scoring multiple hat-tricks, an improbable scenario given current trajectories and squad depths.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a February-refreshed roster featuring riflers VILBy, s1nside, mazay, kidofpain, and AWPer Kiryasoo under veteran coach S0tF1k, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage Swiss Round 1 BO3 as the higher-tier favorite against Wave Esports. Spirit's peak HLTV #32 ranking and consistent C-tier deep runs shaped trader consensus, bolstered by strong T-side execution on the active map pool (Anubis, Ancient, Dust2, Inferno, Mirage, Nuke, Overpass). Wave, anchored by Katalic and sheezy with stand-ins like cMS, rode qualifier momentum from a 2-1 upset over Z7 Esports but faced roster instability. No patch changes or injuries in the prior week; online format emphasized veto strategy and pistol round edges in this evenly matched opener.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: CFTC's March 12 advisory has accelerated designated contract markets' (DCMs) self-certifications for sports event contracts, clarifying standards like pre-filing league consultations, official data settlement, and manipulation safeguards to comply with core principles. CME Group already self-certified multiple contracts and inked the first MOU with MLB for integrity monitoring, boosting trader confidence in regulated prediction markets. With the event contracts proposal withdrawn in February and ANPRM comments closed April 30, newer DCM hopefuls like Railbird, LedgerX, and ForecastEx face heightened scrutiny amid NBA calls for KYC reforms. The June 30 deadline looms as a key catalyst, with exchanges racing to list binary futures on game outcomes before potential rulemaking.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 140-159 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Valorant: T1 vs FULL SENSE (BO3) - VCT Pacific Group Omega
markets.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between T1 and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Group Omega, initially scheduled for May 2 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "T1" if T1 win the match against FULL SENSE.

This market will resolve to "FULL SENSE" if FULL SENSE win the match against T1.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Jeddah be 34°C on May 2?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely clusters implied probabilities around 35–37°C for Jeddah's May 2 high temperature at King Abdulaziz International Airport, reflecting forecast model agreement from GFS and ECMWF ensembles projecting daytime peaks in this range amid hazy sunshine and northerly winds at 15–25 km/h. Key differentiators include the timing and intensity of the afternoon sea breeze from the Red Sea, which moderates coastal heat through cooler, moist inflow, versus persistent subsidence under a subtropical high-pressure ridge enhancing solar heating. Current observations already approach 37°C midday, with haze potentially curbing further rises by scattering sunlight; official hourly METAR reports through late afternoon will clarify the peak, as short-range uncertainty persists in surface wind shifts and insolation. Historical May averages near 36–37°C provide climatological context for this tight contest.

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 325M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Official hourly observations from the National Weather Service's Automated Surface Observing System (ASOS) at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport (KATL) confirm Atlanta's highest temperature on May 1 peaked at 65°F around 3:52 p.m. local time, with readings otherwise steady at 64°F amid persistent overcast skies, northwest winds around 7-10 mph, and a cool post-frontal air mass. This aligns with trader consensus at 99.9% implied probability for 64-65°F, reflecting real-time data feeds from NOAA-affiliated stations that traders monitor closely. Well below the early May climatological normal of 78°F, the cool anomaly stems from a recent upper-level trough suppressing solar heating. Final quality-controlled data from the National Centers for Environmental Information could theoretically challenge this if sensor calibration adjustments reveal a brief 66°F spike, though such revisions are rare for clear ASOS records.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid heightened US-Iran tensions over the Strait of Hormuz blockade and nuclear enrichment, recent diplomatic efforts centered on mediated talks in Islamabad, Pakistan. The first round on April 11-12 featured US Vice President JD Vance leading alongside special envoy Steve Witkoff, advisor Jared Kushner, and CENTCOM's Brad Cooper, while Iran sent Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, but ended without agreement after 21 hours. A planned second round around April 25 saw Witkoff and Kushner prepared to engage Araghchi, though Iran balked at direct meetings citing excessive US demands, shifting discussions to phone calls. No date is set for the next in-person summit, with ongoing Omani and Pakistani mediation amid ceasefire pressures and Trump's public frustration over stalled proposals.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company which owns the model which has the highest arena rank based off the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" section on the Leaderboard tab of https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with the style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Houston be between 80-81°F on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the William P. Hobby Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

Yoo, seeking a third term, announced April 29 amid opposition struggles. Barring late scandals, voter turnout shifts favoring conservatives, or national political surprises, Park's position remains dominant in this key battleground race.

eventMetadata.context_description: Atlético Madrid, entrenched in fourth place in the La Liga table after 33 matches, host sixth-placed RC Celta de Vigo on May 9 at Riyadh Air Metropolitano in a pivotal late-season clash for Champions League qualification. Los Colchoneros' recent form includes gritty home wins over Athletic Bilbao (3-2) and Getafe (1-0), bolstered by strong head-to-head dominance (19 wins in 30 meetings), though injuries to José Giménez (muscle), Dávid Hancko (ankle), and Pablo Barrios (thigh) temper squad depth. Celta, winless in their last five with a 1-0 loss to Barcelona, face away form woes despite a 1-1 draw at home earlier this season; key absences like Manu Fernández (muscle) add pressure amid their Europa League push. Home advantage and table stakes shape trader consensus.

markets.question: Will Kim Jong Un be the next leader out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the first listed individual who ceases to occupy their listed office.

An announcement of a resignation/removal, or a scheduled departure from office due to the outcome of an election, will not alone qualify.

Only permanent removal from office will qualify for resolution. Temporary removals, such as impeachment suspensions (e.g., Yoon Suk Yeol's recent impeachment), temporary invocation of the 25th Amendment, or any similar provisional transfers of power, will not count.

Additionally, if an individual continues in a caretaker or interim role (e.g., Gabriel Attal remaining as caretaker Prime Minister of France), they will not be considered to have ceased occupying the office for the purposes of this market.

If this criterion has not been met for any of the listed individuals by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “None before 2027”. No additional individuals will be added to this market after its creation.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.
